title.zh: 09 文档与 PDF 摘要到证据表
title.en: 09 Document and PDF Summary to Evidence Table

basis.zh: 脱敏 PDF、摘要目标、页码规则、输出字段
basis.en: Redacted PDF, summary goal, page-numbering rules, and output fields

basis.zh: 证据表、页码、摘录线索、问题清单
basis.en: Evidence table, page numbers, excerpt cues, and question list

basis.zh: 人工检查 evidence-table.md 每行是否包含页码和摘录线索。
basis.en: Manually check every evidence-table.md row for page number and excerpt cue.

zh: 人工检查 evidence-table.md 每行是否包含页码和摘录线索。
人工回到 PDF 核对所有金额、日期、责任人和限制条件。
en: Manually check every evidence-table.md row for page number and excerpt cue.
Manually return to the PDF to verify all amounts, dates, owners, and constraints.
